phases.name: Fix Failing Enrollment Token Tests
phases.description: Fix 4 failing tests in services/auth-service/repository/enrollment_token_test.go. Tests fail with 'relation enrollment_tokens does not exist (SQLSTATE 42P01)'. The migration file 000006_create_enrollment_tokens_table.up.sql exists but tests aren't running migrations properly. Fix internal/testutil/migrate.go to ensure enrollment_tokens table is created before tests run. Verify testutil setup calls all migration files, not just users table. Run tests with full migration suite to confirm fix: go test -v ./services/auth-service/repository/...
success_criteria: enrollment_tokens table created during test setup
Test suite run: go test ./services/auth-service/repository/... passes

phases.name: Build and Verify Frontend Dashboard
phases.description: Dashboard components exist but frontend shows 'no' build status. Navigate to web/dashboard, run npm install if needed, then execute npm run build. Verify TypeScript compilation with npm run type-check. Fix any TS errors that prevent build. Ensure Vite can bundle the React application. Verify build artifacts are generated in web/dashboard/dist/. This phase validates the frontend is production-ready after the component creation rounds.
success_criteria: npm run build completes without errors
npm run type-check passes with no TS errors
Dashboard can be served and loads in browser

phases.name: Frontend Testing Suite
phases.description: Dashboard has no test files. Create test suite for React components using React Testing Library and Vitest. Add tests for: LoginForm (submit with valid/invalid credentials), JobList (render jobs, filter functionality), DeviceList (display devices, status indicators), DocumentList (upload, delete actions), Dashboard home (stats display). Create web/dashboard/src/__tests__/ directory. Add test setup in web/dashboard/vitest.config.ts. Ensure npm run test passes with at least 70% coverage.
success_criteria: npm run test passes all tests

phases.name: E2E Testing with Playwright
phases.description: Add end-to-end tests using Playwright. Test critical user flows: login → dashboard → view jobs → submit print job → view devices. Create web/dashboard/e2e/ directory with tests for authentication flow, job submission, device registration. Configure Playwright to run against local dev server. Ensure tests can run headlessly in CI. This validates the entire user journey works end-to-end.
success_criteria: 5 E2E test scenarios covering main flows
npx playwright test passes all scenarios
E2E tests integrated with CI pipeline

phases.name: API Documentation with OpenAPI/Swagger
phases.description: Generate API documentation using swagger annotations. Add swagger docs to all service handlers: auth, registry, job, storage, notification, gateway, analytics, organization. Install swaggo/swag for Go. Create main.go annotations for each service. Run swag init to generate docs. Expose /swagger endpoint on API gateway. This enables interactive API exploration for developers and external consumers.
success_criteria: Swagger annotations added to all handlers
API docs cover all endpoints with request/response schemas

phases.name: Metrics and Observability
phases.description: Add Prometheus metrics export to all services. Create internal/shared/metrics/prometheus.go with metrics for: HTTP request duration, error rate, active connections, queue depth. Expose /metrics endpoint on each service. Add Grafana dashboard in deployments/docker/grafana/dashboards/. Configure Prometheus scrape configs. This enables production monitoring and alerting on system health.
success_criteria: Alert rules configured for critical failures

phases.name: Production Readiness Checklist
phases.description: Complete production readiness tasks: 1) Add health check grace periods for container startup. 2) Implement graceful shutdown with context timeout. 3) Add structured logging with JSON format option. 4) Configure CORS properly for production domains. 5) Add rate limiting middleware with Redis backend. 6) Validate all secrets are externalized via environment variables. 7) Create production docker-compose.yml with resource limits. 8) Add backup/restore scripts for PostgreSQL.
success_criteria: Rate limiting enabled on public endpoints
Database backup script tested and documented

phases.name: Performance Optimization
phases.description: Profile and optimize performance bottlenecks. Add pprof HTTP endpoints to services. Run load tests using k6 or vegeta on critical paths: login, job submission, device registration. Identify slow queries and add database indexes. Optimize JSON marshaling, implement response caching where appropriate. Add connection pooling configuration validation. Benchmark before/after to validate improvements.

critical_issues: 10 out of 24 tests failing (42% failure rate)
enrollment_tokens table not created during test migrations
strengths: Full React dashboard with all feature components created

rationale: Phases ordered following strict rules: (1) Fix failing tests first—enrollment_token tests fail due to missing table, blocking CI. (2) Build frontend—components exist but unverified build. (3) Frontend tests—no test coverage exists for React components. (4) E2E tests—validate complete user flows. (5-8) DevOps and hardening—API docs, metrics, production readiness, performance once core functionality works. Skipping TODOs (2 documentation comments) as they're non-blocking. Project score 72 reflects strong architecture but critical test failures blocking deployment readiness.
